Spacing Rules

Clear Space

Maintain a minimum exclusion zone around the logo equal to the height of one diamond arm unit (x).

The clear space unit x equals the height of one diamond arm in the logo mark. No other visual elements, text, or edges should enter this zone.

Scale

Minimum Sizes

Recommended sizing to maintain legibility and visual integrity at every scale.

Best for hero banners and splash screens
0px Hero / Headers
Ideal for presentations and documents
0px Presentations
Navigation bars and inline usage
0px Navigation
Favicons and small UI elements
0px Favicons Recommended
Absolute minimum -- below this loses legibility
0px Minimum Min. Size
Guidelines

Logo Misuse

Protect brand integrity. Never modify the logo in any of these ways.

×
Don't stretch or distort
Correct
×
Don't change brand colors
Correct
×
Don't add shadows or effects
Correct
×
Don't rotate or tilt
Correct
×
Don't place on busy backgrounds
Correct
×
Don't crop the logo
Correct
Contexts

On Color Backgrounds

Approved logo placements across the full range of brand surfaces.

Primary usage ALLONE #FFFFFF
Website surfaces ALLONE #F8FAFE

CTAs, feature sections ALLONE #0A68F5
Premium sections, hero ALLONE Gradient
Photography, complex imagery ALLONE Complex BG
